title: First-Line Supervisors of Non-Retail Sales Workers
description: Directly supervise and coordinate activities of sales workers other than retail sales workers. May perform duties such as budgeting, accounting, and personnel work, in addition to supervisory duties.

tasks.text: Monitor sales staff performance to ensure that goals are met.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide staff with assistance in performing difficult or complicated duties.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct and supervise employees engaged in sales, inventory-taking, reconciling cash receipts, or performing specific services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Listen to and resolve customer complaints regarding services, products, or personnel.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Keep records pertaining to purchases, sales, and requisitions.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.
Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Confer with company officials to develop methods and procedures to increase sales, expand markets, and promote business.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and prepare work schedules, and assign employees to specific duties.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend company meetings to exchange product information and coordinate work activities with other departments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Visit retailers and sales representatives to promote products and gather information.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Formulate pricing policies on merchandise according to profitability requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare sales and inventory reports for management and budget departments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Examine products purchased for resale or received for storage to determine product condition.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine merchandise to ensure correct pricing and display, and that it functions as advertised.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Analyze details of sales territories to assess their growth potential and to set quotas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Inventory stock and reorder when inventories drop to specified levels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate sales promotion activities, such as preparing merchandise displays and advertising copy.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare rental or lease agreements, specifying charges and payment procedures for use of machinery, tools, or other items.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
